meta.title: RX SUBZERO | A refined facial cold-water ritual
meta.description: Meet RX SUBZERO, a collapsible facial basin with a clear dual breathing tube for a refined cold-water beauty ritual at home.

hero.sub: A refined facial bath for cold water, ice and steady breathing. Designed to sit naturally beside the rest of your morning beauty ritual.

context.title: Let the ritual feel as considered as the rest of your routine.
context.copy: RX SUBZERO gives cold water and ice a dedicated place in your beauty ritual. Its restrained form keeps the experience composed, practical and easy to repeat.
context.img_alt: RX SUBZERO prepared beside a simple morning skincare routine

points.title: Begin fresh
points.text: Prepare the basin as part of a clean, unrushed morning setup.

points.title: Choose the temperature
points.text: Start cool and add ice gradually according to your comfort.

points.title: Breathe steadily
points.text: The integrated tube gives the breath a clear place in the ritual.

points.title: Continue your routine
points.text: Dry your face gently, then move into the skincare steps you already use.

ritual.title: Simple preparation. A clear, sensory moment.
ritual.copy: The product keeps the process visually calm: one basin, one breathing tube and a short ritual at your own pace.

steps.title: Prepare
steps.text: Open the basin, place it on a stable surface, and begin with cool water at a comfortable temperature.
steps.img_alt: Ice being added to the RX SUBZERO face bath

steps.title: Breathe and approach gradually
steps.text: Position the mouthpiece, keep your breathing steady, and approach the water in brief, comfortable intervals.
steps.img_alt: Woman using RX SUBZERO during her facial cold-water ritual

steps.title: Rinse and store
steps.text: Empty, rinse with mild soap and water, let every part air-dry fully, then collapse the basin for storage.
steps.img_alt: RX SUBZERO basin and breathing tube laid out to dry after use

pain.kicker: When your routine moves faster than you do
pain.title: Some mornings, your face tells the story of tiredness before you do.
pain.copy: Between the rush, the screen, and a routine on autopilot, caring for yourself can become one more task.

aspiration.title: Feel fresh, cared for, and ready to begin.
aspiration.copy: RX SUBZERO turns cold water into a brief, deliberate facial pause before you continue with the products you already use.
aspiration.image_alt: RX SUBZERO ready for a morning facial ritual

story.title: Not a generic container. A dedicated facial cold-water system.
story.copy: RX SUBZERO was created to turn a familiar practice into a simple, elegant experience designed around everyday wellbeing.

benefits.title: Facial care that feels as considered as it looks.
benefits.copy: A simple sensory experience, with an object designed to fit naturally into your routine.

items.title: A fresh beginning
items.text: Contact with cold water creates a clear sensory moment at the start of your routine.

items.title: Care with intention
items.text: It invites you to reserve a few minutes for your face without adding a complicated routine.

items.title: Before your skincare
items.text: Pat dry gently and continue with the products already in your routine.

items.title: A premium presence
items.text: Its blue-and-white form keeps the ritual organized and visually calm.

product.title: A functional object with a calm presence.
product.copy: The steel-blue basin, clear dual tube and integrated blue base form one recognizable system. It opens for use, folds for storage and keeps the cold-water setup in one place.
product.img_alt: RX SUBZERO face ice bath presented with its clear breathing tube

faq.title: Questions before you begin.
faq.copy: A straightforward look at how the product fits into a beauty routine.

items.q: What does the product consist of?
items.a: The product format shown includes the collapsible basin and its clear dual breathing tube with white mouthpiece.

items.q: Where does it fit in my routine?
items.a: Use it on clean skin before the leave-on skincare products in your usual routine. Dry your face gently before continuing.

items.q: How do I care for it?
items.a: Empty after use, rinse the basin and breathing tube with mild soap and water, then let both air-dry fully before storing.

items.q: Should I begin with ice water?
items.a: No. Begin with cool water and brief intervals. Add ice gradually only if your skin and comfort level respond well.

items.q: Is cold exposure suitable for everyone?
items.a: Cold exposure may not be appropriate for everyone. If you have a health condition, sensitivity or concern, speak with a qualified healthcare professional first.

offer.title: Give cold water a place in your facial care.
offer.copy: A collapsible system with a clear dual breathing tube, created to make preparation and use feel more ordered.
offer.image_alt: Blue and white collapsible RX SUBZERO facial basin with clear breathing tube
offer.note: Use cold gradually and always at your own comfort level.

final.title: You do not need another impossible routine. You need a moment you will want to repeat.
final.copy: Begin with cool water, progress gradually, and turn a few minutes of your morning into a deliberate act of care.

footer.tagline: A more considered facial cold-water ritual.
